creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
The matreshka port available in package repository:
$ pkg search matreshka
matreshka-21.0_2               Ada framework for information systems development

Maybe did this commit [1] fix it?

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/devel/matreshka?id=12b0562541f5d1adbdbb2c1d00c865ed82a1cff9
